reviewer: Codex application UI screenshot visual review

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing remains visibly different from the same-name reference in composition, annotation style, and sheet treatment.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Generated front/top/right/isometric view placement still does not follow the reference layout; the main views are arranged and scaled differently.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Required reference-intent targets are still not preserved; staged lifecycle evidence reports missing post-layout targets and final DisplayDim below the reference floor.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Generated dimensions remain clustered and small around the main and projected views, with manufacturing callouts hard to read at UI review scale.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated lower-right title/table treatment remains different from the compact reference style.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Reference-style blue technical annotations and manufacturing notes are missing or not reproduced with matching placement and completeness.

findings: The Drawing Review application UI screenshot was captured from the fresh run_dir PNG for run e775b762205c.
The materialization fallback improved live view probing, but the generated drawing still fails the visible reference comparison.
Structured evidence still reports post-layout live view recovery failure for front/right/top and missing targets right_end_offset, hole_diameter, hole_pitch, and projection_view_height.
API/reference scores are supporting evidence only and do not override this visual checklist failure.
entries.required_correction: Revise 006 generation so slot rebinding uses the materialized live DrawingView objects, all 12 reference-intent DisplayDim targets persist through dimension_validation_final, and the visible layout/title block/notes match the same-name reference before any dependent drawing is attempted.
